title: Global stocks slide as Middle East anxiety offsets AI optimism
description: Asian stocks slipped broadly in choppy Tuesday trading as doubts over the durability of a Middle East ceasefire blunted the boost from AI optimism. MSCI’s broadest index of Asia-Pacific shares outside Japan fell 0.6%, having fluctuated between gains and losses as trading commenced. title: Flex Showcases Scalable Power Solutions for New AI Infrastructure at COMPUTEX 2026
